payload.$comment: Shared primitives inlined from upstream definitions.json; not resolved at runtime (ADR 0064).
payload.title: CoW Hook

target.title: Hook Target
target.description: The contract to call for the hook

callData.title: Hook CallData
callData.description: The calldata to use when calling the hook

gasLimit.title: Hook Gas Limit
gasLimit.description: The gas limit (in gas units) for the hook

dappId.title: Id of the dApp which has built the hook
dappId.description: CoW Swap has an interface that allows dApps to build hooks for orders. This field is used to identify the dApp that has built the hook.
